name: Sangomon

signature_move.name: Refuge Mist
signature_move.description: Spreads a poisonous, lachrymatory mist from its coral when attacked by intruders.

description: A Mollusk Digimon that lives in the shallows of the Net Ocean . It often mingles with other species due to its gentle disposition and cheerfulness. It uses the backs of Shellmon as a resting spot, and Ganimon have been witnessed trimming the coral protruding from its head. When attacked by intruders, it spreads a poisonous, lachrymatory mist from its coral and escapes ( Refuge Mist ); if it is unable to escape in time, it fights back with its " Coral Pressure ", which releases high-pressure water from the ends of its arms.
